channel.title: art on evocations
channel.description: Recent content in art on evocations

item.title: Art-vent calendar
item.description: This month I’m going to try to make some art, because it’s fun. I’m going to do it every day, because then I will get better quickly. Every day I’ll post something I make here. Since art can always be tweaked, I am setting my goal at the end of the month to be efficiency. I want to be able to create a piece of art that is of high quality in a short time (e.
